title: VIDEO: Investcorp’s Guardian Fire acquires Midwest Protection in US expansion push
summary: US-based Guardian Fire Services, a portfolio company of Bahraini alternative investment firm Investcorp, has acquired Nebraska-based fire and life safety solutions provider Midwest Protection Services
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
Fire Alarm Signal on Brick wall. Image courtesy: Getty Images

US-based Guardian Fire Services, a portfolio company of Bahraini alternative investment firm Investcorp, has acquired Nebraska-based fire and life safety solutions provider Midwest Protection Services

Staff Writer ,  ZAWYA

 Financial terms of the transaction were not disclosed. Watch the Zawya video here:
